top_p0_actions.title: Write snapshot after bulk upload
commands: apply patch to /api/capabilities/bulk: add transactional INSERT INTO capability_snapshots(user_id, avg_maturity) VALUES ($1,$2)

top_p0_actions.title: Daily idempotent dashboard snapshot
commands: apply patch to /api/dashboard: run idempotent INSERT (WHERE NOT EXISTS on snapshot_date = CURRENT_DATE)

top_p0_actions.title: Fix CSV header validation (shared validator)
commands: replace rows-based check with header-check: parse first row headers; trim().toLowerCase(); accept header 'capability' or 'name'
extract validator to packages/validator/csv.js and import in frontend + backend

top_p0_actions.title: Publish deterministic sample.csv + UI schema display
commands: add /public/sample.csv with exact headers and example row
update upload page to link /public/sample.csv and show minimal schema block

p1_actions.title: Centralize CSV validator + tests
p1_actions.notes: Add unit tests and CI check; do not auto-apply until P0s verified

p1_actions.title: Harden startup JWT handling
p1_actions.notes: Replace uncaught throw with explicit startup check + process.exit(1) and health-check endpoint

p2_actions.title: E2E test: sample CSV → DB rows → snapshot
p2_actions.notes: Playwright/Vitest smoke to validate full loop

slos.snapshot_persistence: 100% of successful bulk uploads write snapshot within same transaction
slos.csv_upload_success_sample: sample CSV uploads and ingests in <30s

acceptance_criteria: AC1: Upload /public/sample.csv via UI → capabilities populated AND capability_snapshots row inserted within 1 minute
AC2: Valid CSV with header 'capability' or 'name' (even if some rows blank) is accepted; backend does not reject based on blank rows alone
AC3: Dashboard shows trend line after two snapshots exist
AC4: CI step `cp .env.example .env && pnpm test` passes validator tests on PR
rollback_principles: Small atomic commits per feature branch
Prefer config/env change + feature-flag over code changes when possible
DB changes reversible via migration rollback or targeted deletes on test/demo rows
artifacts_to_produce: /public/sample.csv and upload page UI schema text
CI update to run CSV validator test and sample upload smoke test
migration notes describing snapshot INSERT behaviour
one_line_justification: Write snapshots and fix header validation immediately: low-risk atomic fixes that restore the core analysis loop and enable UX value.
parallelization_guidance: Apply R1+R2 concurrently; start R3 in parallel; defer R5/R7 until P0s validated.
